headline: Bitcoin Surges to $66K on US-Iran Peace Deal

article.title: Bitcoin nears $66K as Trump says US has peace deal with Iran
article.summary: US President Donald Trump says the US and Iran have a deal for a “toll-free opening of the Strait of Hormuz,” sending Bitcoin to a two-week high.

headline: CFTC Sues New Mexico Over $1B Crypto Market

article.title: CFTC sues New Mexico over prediction market jurisdiction
article.summary: New Mexico is the eighth state sued by the CFTC over prediction markets, as Gary Gensler doubted the regulators' claim of authority over sports event contracts.

headline: Gulf Transit Risks Ease Amid $1Bn Shipping Snarl

article.title: Shipowners Seek Details on Hormuz Deal Before Resuming Transits
article.summary: A US-Iran deal intended to reopen the Strait of Hormuz within days has been met with caution by shipowners and traders, with many saying they would need more details in order to assess whether safe transits are possible after months of false starts.

headline: Oil Plunges 5% Amid Iran Deal, Stocks Surge

article.title: Stocks and Bonds Rally as Oil Falls on Iran Deal: Markets Wrap
article.summary: Stocks and bonds rallied while oil tumbled to a three-month low after the US and Iran agreed to end their war and reopen the Strait of Hormuz.

headline: Bitcoin Surges Past $65,000 on Easing Geopolitical Tensions

article.title: Bitcoin tops $65,000 as reports of US-Iran peace deal ease geopolitical fears
article.summary: The rally reflected improving risk sentiment following reports that the U.S. and Iran have reached a peace agreement, analysts said.
